privacy.notes: Synthetic metadata-only contract. Precomputed outputs, local-only grouper/service references, and restricted classification payloads are intentionally excluded.

commands.name: list_precomputed_emergency_outputs
commands.notes: List synthetic precomputed emergency classification output manifests without embedding grouper payloads.

commands.name: validate_emergency_grouper_compatibility
commands.notes: Check compatibility between a precomputed output or external grouper/service reference and the requested pricing year and emergency stream.

commands.name: resolve_local_emergency_grouper_reference
commands.notes: Record a user-supplied local-only external grouper or service reference without bundling restricted content.

commands.name: describe_no_proprietary_payload_boundary
commands.notes: Declare that proprietary grouper logic, licensed tables, and production extracts remain excluded from the committed fixtures.

integration_surface_types.label: Precomputed output manifest
integration_surface_types.purpose: Metadata-only declaration of emergency classification outputs that were produced outside the repository and committed only as safe synthetic references.

integration_surface_types.label: Local-only external grouper or service reference
integration_surface_types.purpose: Local placeholder for a user-supplied grouper binary, command-line integration, file-exchange adapter, or service endpoint.

integration_surface_types.label: Compatibility diagnostics record
integration_surface_types.purpose: Synthetic validation and boundary diagnostics for year, stream, provenance, and local-reference checks.

integration_surface_types.label: No proprietary payload boundary record
integration_surface_types.purpose: Explicit boundary declaration for fixtures that must not contain proprietary payloads, licensed tables, or restricted groupers.

compatibility_rules.label: Metadata-only contract
compatibility_rules.description: Reject contract entries that embed proprietary grouper logic, licensed tables, production extracts, or PHI.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared precomputed output
compatibility_rules.description: Require precomputed output examples to declare the pricing year, stream type, and synthetic output summary.

compatibility_rules.label: Local-only external reference
compatibility_rules.description: Record external grouper and service assets only as local placeholders and do not bundle the restricted content itself.

compatibility_rules.label: Pricing-year alignment
compatibility_rules.description: Require declared emergency outputs and references to match the selected pricing-year window.

compatibility_rules.label: No silent UDG/AECC translation
compatibility_rules.description: Do not infer UDG or AECC conversions unless a declared source manifest or local reference is supplied.

compatibility_rules.label: Declared payload boundary
compatibility_rules.description: Require every fixture bundle to declare that proprietary payloads and licensed classification content are absent.

examples.name: precomputed-output-manifest
examples.description: Synthetic manifest for precomputed emergency classification outputs with provenance and compatibility metadata.

examples.name: external-local-grouper-service-reference
examples.description: Synthetic local-only placeholder for a user-supplied emergency grouper or service reference.

examples.name: compatibility-diagnostics
examples.description: Synthetic diagnostics report covering pricing-year, stream, provenance, and boundary checks.

examples.name: no-proprietary-payload-boundary
examples.description: Synthetic declaration of the no-proprietary-payload boundary for emergency grouper integration fixtures.
